THEUNDERSTUDY-PLANNED_POTION.description: Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card from your draw pile, a card in your hand, and a card from your discard pile.

THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNED_POTION.description: Apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to up to 3 cards in your hand.

THEUNDERSTUDY-MILKSHAKE.description: Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all cards in your hand.
